audit.note: each toggle press toasts `{0} {1?Pressed:Unpressed}` roundtrip-free via control_global MESSAGE_TOAST.show ({0} = $event.oSource.sId, {1} = $event.oSource.getPressed() mapped Pressed/Unpressed by the conditional placeholder); the app is now init-only

deviations.what: onPress toasts the source control id + Pressed/Unpressed; both arrive via $event.oSource (sId and getPressed()) - the earlier ${$source>/pressed} binding did not resolve at runtime.

the press toast was switched to a roundtrip-free client-composed toast on 2026-07-22 using the conditional placeholder (control_global MESSAGE_TOAST.show, template `{0} {1?Pressed:Unpressed}`; on_event dropped, init-only) - re-verify pressing a ToggleButton toasts "<id> Pressed" when down and "<id> Unpressed" when up.
